nasb.text: Remember me for this, O my God, and do not blot out my loyal deeds which I have performed for the house of my God and its services.

esv.text: Remember me, O my God, concerning this, and do not wipe out my good deeds that I have done for the house of my God and for his service.

cnv.text: “我的　神啊，求你因這事記念我，不要塗抹我為我　神的殿和一切敬拜的禮儀所行的忠誠的事。”

ccb.text: 我的上帝啊，求你因这事而记念我，不要涂抹我为上帝的殿和其中的敬拜礼仪所做的善事。
